case_title: ODRA DUNN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,165.68 FILED BY DUNN, ODRA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-01-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNN, ODRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
